creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Note:

1.22.1 is a maintenance/bugfix release: https://numpy.org/devdocs/release/1.22.1-notes.html

1.22.2 is a bugfix and security release: https://numpy.org/devdocs/release/1.22.2-notes.html

1.22.3 is a bugfix and maintenance release: https://numpy.org/devdocs/release/1.22.3-notes.html

@Wen If you're already taking care of this, please self-assign and let us know whats needed to land these updates as soon as possible.

If not, and someone else would like to champion this issues resolution, self-assign and we can support you getting it done.
